strategy: Solo-friendly (3,240 health). Do not cast weaknesses (you get a Myth Trap) or shields (the recipient gets a Myth Trap).
She keeps a trap on you: any round you have none, she Hexes all wizards.
Never let your trap count reach three. At 3+ traps she fires Vermin Virtuoso for 943 Myth, so keep it at one or two.
She opens with Time of Legend on round 1. Blade up and burst her down fast given her low health.
Skip weaknesses and shields, hit with a strong non-Myth school, and finish before traps stack.
cheatNotes: Casting a weakness or harmful charm gets you a Myth Trap. Skip weaknesses.
Casting a shield or helpful ward gets the recipient a Myth Trap. Skip shields.
Any round you have no trap on you, she Hexes all wizards to keep a trap on you.
The moment you carry three or more traps she fires Vermin Virtuoso for 943 Myth. Keep your trap count under three.
